title: Assorted Color Disc Shooters - Pack of 4 - Flying Disc, Perfect Party Favors for Kids
features: EXCITING DISC SHOOTERS: Our assorted color disc shooters provide hours of exhilarating fun, perfect for birthday parties, playdates, or any gathering of kids.
VIBRANT ASSORTED COLORS: This pack of 4 flying discs comes in a variety of eye-catching colors, ensuring there's one for every child to enjoy and making your party extra colorful.
HIGH-FLYING FUN: Watch the excitement unfold as each flying disc effortlessly soars through the air, adding an element of thrill to any game at the park or in your backyard.
PERFECT PARTY FAVORS: These assorted color disc shooters make for delightful take-home gifts, leaving lasting impressions as your guests continue to enjoy them long after the party's over.
SAFE & ENTERTAINING: Crafted with high-quality materials, our disc shooters are safe for kids and designed to provide endless amusement, making them the ultimate choice for your next event.
description: Product Description Add excitement to the party with these Plastic Disc Shooter Party Favors. This pack of fun favors includes 4 shooters and 4 matching plastic discs which measures approx. 4" long . With a squeeze of the handle, they will shoot out a flying disc into the air. These flying disc shooters make awesome game prizes for a kids birthday party. You can also pop a disc and shooter into each guest's goodie bag with other candy and party favors. Box Contains 1 x Pack of 4 Plastic Disc Shooters
